hints.title: Hint 1
hints.content: Start merging from the **end** of both arrays. Place the larger element at position `m+n-1` of `nums1`.

hints.title: Hint 2
hints.content: Use three pointers: `p1 = m-1`, `p2 = n-1`, `p = m+n-1`. Move backwards, always picking the larger of `nums1[p1]` and `nums2[p2]`.
